svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="znYxTHRnu-AzM0mVQxNS" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="828" dy="571" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="server" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=26;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>Server</b><br>(Tomcat实例,代表整个容器)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="760" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="service" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=26;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>Service</b><br>(服务组件,包含一个 Engine + 多个 Connector)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="740" x="30" y="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connector" parent="service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;" value="<b>Connector</b><br>(连接器,监听端口<br>HTTP/8080或AJP/8009<br>接收请求→解析协议<br>→包装为Request/Response)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="40" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="executor" parent="service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#388E3C;" value="<b>Executor</b><br>(线程池<br>处理Connector<br>接收的请求)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="290" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="engine" parent="service" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF9C4;strokeColor=#F9A825;" value="<b>Engine</b><br>(引擎,处理所有请求,分发到Host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="230" x="480" y="36" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="host" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#E65100;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>Host</b><br>(虚拟主机,如localhost<br>一个Engine可有多个Host)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="700" x="46" y="304" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="context" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=24;fillColor=#fce4ec;strokeColor=#C62828;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>Context</b><br>(Web应用上下文<br>每个WAR=一个Context<br>对应一个ServletContext)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="660" x="66" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="filter_chain" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=22;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>FilterChain</b><br>(过滤器链,按顺序执行Filter)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="620" x="86" y="564" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="servlet" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=22;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;html=1;" value="<b>Servlet</b><br>(最终处理的Servlet,doGet/doPost/doPut/doDelete)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="580" x="106" y="682" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="connector_edge" edge="1" parent="1" source="connector" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#1565C0;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="executor" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="service" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;fontStyle=1;" target="host" value="请求→"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="host" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="context" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="context" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="filter_chain" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="filter_chain" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1.5;" target="servlet" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="req_annotation" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=#FFCDD2;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontStyle=1;" value="<b>↑ 请求处理方向</b><br>Server→Service→Engine→Host→Context→FilterChain→Servlet" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="35" width="350" x="735" y="665" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="listener_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE082;strokeColor=#FFB300;dashed=1;align=left;" value="<b>Listener (监听器)</b><br>• ServletContextListener: 应用启动/销毁时触发<br>• ServletRequestListener: 请求创建/销毁时触发<br>• HttpSessionListener: Session创建/销毁时触发" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="320" x="841" y="496" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_listener" edge="1" parent="1" source="listener_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#FFB300;strokeWidth=1.5;dashed=1;fontStyle=2;" target="context" value="监听生命周期事件"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
Listener (监听器)
• ServletContextListener: 应用启动/销毁时触发
• ServletRequestListener: 请求创建/销毁时触发
• HttpSessionListener: Session创建/销毁时触发
